human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive (Kevin, 2026-07-01). Reviewed: 19-REQ spec (revised once pre-gate via adversarial spec review), 14-task plan, 74-test suite incl. sanctioned TEST-070 supersession and the TEST-324 correction (a frozen test contradicting the frozen spec — caught by review), implementation through two fix loopbacks, all 23 findings resolved, CONV-019..021 promoted, one residual (FINDING-023 pinning test) explicitly inherited by F8.

escalations.reason: Review fan-out found 3 blocking HIGH/contract findings, all tests-phase-origin: FINDING-008 (fallback keyboard-dead, no keyboard-activation coverage existed), FINDING-020 (frozen TEST-324 pins match-failure fall-through where the frozen spec REQ-009 mandates availability gating — a frozen test contradicting the frozen spec), FINDING-021 (only 2 of 9 consumed fields validated; malformed push crashes the renderer, TEST-312 too shallow). Human decision needed on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to tests (delegated-human decision, autonomous drive authorization 2026-07-01). All three blockers are tests-phase-origin. Test-designer: (1) amend TEST-324's seam vector — the matcher seam keeps skip-on-invalid, but candidate AVAILABILITY gating per REQ-009 moves to the caller and gets its own pinned seam (live cwd when known; config.cwd only when no live cwd; gitStatus.root only when neither) — this is the sanctioned frozen-test amendment correcting a test that contradicts the frozen spec; (2) add keyboard-activation coverage for the pane-less fallback (structural target-guard pin + e2e keyboard vector) per FINDING-008; (3) deepen the TEST-312 family per FINDING-021: mistyped consumed fields (object/number garbage in reason/phase/gateN/gateM/lastActivityAt/detail) yield no item, no crash, no NaN into the comparator; (4) fix the TS2783 fixture wart (FINDING-018) in the same sanctioned touch. Implementer then fixes 008/020/021 plus the cheap MEDIUMs (009 aria count announce, 010 focus management, 012 getState read) and LOWs where trivial (011/013/014/019).

implementer.reason: Loopback fix cycle: same audited single-implementer degrade as the initial implement (codex worktree environment failure documented on F7; determinism covered by frozen tests + determinism lens).

loopbacks.reason: 3 HIGH/contract findings, all tests-origin (FINDING-008/020/021): missing keyboard coverage, TEST-324 contradicts REQ-009, TEST-312 too shallow
FINDING-023 (MEDIUM, below threshold): unconditional focus-restore on drawer close fights the non-modal click-to-focus gesture; fix is the ux-lens-specified conditional restore
